Message privately

Simple, reliable, private messaging and calling, available all over the world. Your conversations stay between you and the people you care about.

Why millions choose Cuqter

security
Security

End-to-End Encryption

Your personal messages and calls are secured with end-to-end encryption. No one outside of your chats, not even Cuqter, can read or listen to them.

public

Global Connectivity

High-quality calls and messaging across the globe, even on slow connections.

groups

Group Chats

Keep in touch with your family and friends with expressive group features.

Privacy is in our DNA

We believe privacy is a fundamental human right. That's why we never sell your data or compromise your security for profit.

2M+ Active Users

Designed for Focus

  • check

    Status Indicators

    Know when your messages are delivered and read with subtle visual cues.

  • check

    Dark Mode Native

    A premium deep-night aesthetic that's easy on the eyes during late-night chats.

  • check

    Atmospheric Depth

    Tonal layers and glassmorphic navigation for a sophisticated, modern feel.
